meta.name: Dark Commerce — Gaming/Tech Marketplace Design System
meta.description: A high-contrast dark mode e-commerce UI system built around deep blacks, electric purples, and bold product photography. Designed for tech/gaming products. The aesthetic is confident, premium, and immersive — not playful. Every surface exists to make the product the hero.
meta.directorsNote: Think PS5 UI meets Darkstore. The purple is never decorative — it always signals interactivity or value. The dark surfaces recede so products advance. Do not brighten the backgrounds. Do not add gradients where there are none. Restraint in surface, aggression in accent.

rules: Product names use md or lg, weight 600–700
Prices use xl or 2xl, weight 800, white
Cent values use base size, weight 400, offset top — never same size as the dollar amount
Labels and categories use xs or sm, uppercase, tracking 0.08em, muted color
Body descriptions use sm, secondary color, max 3 lines before truncation

productCard.description: The core commerce unit. Dark card surface, product image dominates top 55% of card height. Price is always white and bold. Name is white, secondary info is muted.
productCard.layout: vertical stack: image → name → price → add button
productCard.imageStyle: object-fit: cover, no border-radius or subtle radius, image can bleed to card edges on top
productCard.priceStyle: 2xl weight 800, white, with smaller superscript cents
productCard.addButton: circular or pill, accent purple, white '+' icon, right-aligned or bottom full-width

states.highlighted: purple left-border or purple background tint (purpleSubtle)

productDetailHeader.description: Full-width hero for a single product. Image takes up top 45–55% of screen. Floating back button top-left. Product name in xl/2xl below image. Star rating inline. Description in sm secondary.
productDetailHeader.imageBackground: deep black, can use radial purple ambient glow behind product (subtle, not garish)
productDetailHeader.floatingActions: top-right: favorite heart icon, rounded dark pill background
productDetailHeader.colorSwatches: small circles, 28–32px diameter, border: 2px white on selected, stacked horizontally with 8px gap
productDetailHeader.addToCartBar: fixed bottom bar, dark background, price left, purple pill button right

cartItem.description: Horizontal row: thumbnail left, name + price center, quantity stepper right. Highlighted active item uses purpleSubtle background.
cartItem.quantityStepper: minus icon — count — plus icon, all in rounded dark pill, accent purple +/- buttons
cartItem.activeHighlight: full-row background purpleSubtle, left border 3px accent purple

bottomSheet_addToCart.description: Fixed bar at screen bottom. Contains total price (left, sm label + xl price) and primary action button (right, full purple pill). Background: background.secondary with top border subtle.

primaryButton.description: The single most important interactive element. Always solid purple, always pill-shaped, always white text. Never use outlined or ghost variants for primary actions.
primaryButton.withIcon: icon + 8px gap + label, icon is white, same size as text

iconButton.description: Circular or square-rounded dark pill for back, favorite, cart, filter actions. Semi-transparent dark background.

input.description: Ghost input: very dark fill, subtle border, white text, placeholder is muted. No visible label by default — placeholder serves as label. Focus ring is accent purple.

searchBar.description: Full-width input with search icon left-inset. Same ghost style as input. Sits in a sticky header zone.

navigationBar.description: Bottom tab bar. Dark background, 4–5 icon tabs. Active tab: icon turns accent purple with small filled dot or underline below. Inactive: muted icon, no label.
navigationBar.indicator: small filled dot below active icon OR icon fill changes to purple

topBar.description: Minimal navigation header. Back chevron left, title center (md weight 600), optional action icon right. No background fill — inherits screen background.

badge.description: Small count indicators on cart icons or product cards. Purple fill, white text, 18px diameter minimum.

ratingStars.description: Horizontal star row. Filled stars are star yellow (#FFB800), empty are muted. Always show numeric rating right of stars in sm secondary color.

avatarStack.description: Small overlapping user avatars for social proof ('X people bought this'). 28px diameter, 2px white border, -10px negative margin overlap.

categoryFilter.description: Horizontal scroll row of icon+label pills. Active pill has purple fill. Inactive pills have subtle dark fill. Icons are white SVGs.

productImageCarousel.description: Full-bleed image with pagination dots below. Dots: 6px inactive, 18px active (elongated pill), all white with opacity.

sectionHeader.description: 'Popular product', 'Catalog', etc. — left-aligned, lg weight 600, white. Optional 'See all' right-aligned in sm accent purple.

registrationForm.description: Hero image top (full-bleed, circular blob mask or standard top), title below in xl, stacked ghost inputs, purple CTA button full-width at bottom.
registrationForm.imageStyle: top of screen, can use organic blob or circular clip shape in accent purple as background behind image

paymentCard.description: Visa/debit card widget. Purple gradient card, card number partially masked, card holder name, expiry. Small bank logo or card icon.

orderSummary.description: Cart total + QR code + Buy button. Clean dark card, itemized list above, total in xl white below, QR code left of Buy button.

layoutPrinciples.productGrids: 2-column grid for catalog, 1-column for cart/list views
layoutPrinciples.cardElevation: Cards sit on background.primary. Elevated modals/sheets sit on background.secondary. Never use white or light backgrounds.
layoutPrinciples.imageHierarchy: Product images are always the visual hero. They should be large, sharp, isolated on dark backgrounds. Avoid lifestyle images except for registration/onboarding.
layoutPrinciples.density: Medium-high. Show enough product at once to feel like a real catalog, but don't crowd to the point of noise. 12px minimum gap between cards.
layoutPrinciples.scrollBehavior: Horizontal scroll for category filters and featured rows. Vertical scroll for main catalog. No pagination — infinite scroll implied.
layoutPrinciples.fixedElements: Bottom nav and bottom CTA bars are always fixed. Top bar is sticky. Everything else scrolls.

designPrinciples: Purple is reserved for: primary actions, active states, interactive indicators, and price highlights. Never use it decoratively.
The background is near-black, not pure black (#000). This prevents harshness while maintaining depth.
Product images float on dark backgrounds — use drop shadows or radial glows to separate them from the card surface, not borders.
Text hierarchy is enforced by size + weight + color together. Never rely on color alone to establish hierarchy.
Interactive elements are always pill-shaped (full border-radius). Containers/cards use moderate radius (12–16px). This creates a clear visual language: 'pills = tap me', 'cards = content'.
Avoid excessive gradients. The purple gradient is only used in the payment card component. Everything else is flat dark fills.
Spacing is generous within components but tight between them. Internal padding should feel comfortable; card-to-card gaps keep the catalog dense.
No decorative illustrations or icons. Every visual element is either a product image or a functional UI control.
The UI should feel like hardware — precise, machined, purposeful. Not playful, not warm, not soft.

motionGuidelines.philosophy: Motion confirms state changes and aids navigation. It does not entertain.
motionGuidelines.carouselSwipe: native momentum scroll, no easing override
avoid: loading skeletons with shimmer (use simple dark pulse instead)

iconography.style: Outlined, 2px stroke, rounded caps and joins. Never filled except when active.
iconography.activeStyle: Filled or accent-purple stroke for active/selected state
iconography.color: White default, muted for inactive, accent purple for active

do: Use high-res product images with transparent or dark backgrounds
Keep the price as the most visually dominant text element on product cards
Use the purple CTA button for exactly one action per screen
Maintain the near-black background across all screens without exception
Use pill shapes for all interactive buttons
dont: Don't use white or light mode surfaces anywhere in this system
Don't use purple for text — only for backgrounds of interactive elements
Don't add decorative gradients or noise textures to card backgrounds
Don't use more than 2 font weights per screen — hierarchy comes from size, not weight variation
Don't use outlined buttons for primary actions — always solid purple pill
